reply.text: I know for a fact you would not survive leg day with me

messages.text: about that mirror, you’re power walking in pink like it’s a boss
you’ve got cardio; i’ve got chaos on speed dial
you say that but you posted the treadmill like a cry for help
real question, what’s your usual screen brightness
my friend showed me your page. not an accident
trying to see how hard you’ll glow limping after my leg day
my friend showed me your page. not an accident
so. what are you gonna do with that
